sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14851" key="a)rguroqw/rac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀργῠρο-θώραξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾱκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n14851.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a silver breastplate,</tr_> Iamb.post Polem.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.49</biblScope> </bibl> Hinck.</sense> </entryFree>
